packetNotice: This packet prepares deterministic claim review input. It does not call an LLM or assert that any claim is satisfied.

selectionPolicy.reason: already-satisfied and already-reviewed non-stale claims do not need LLM review by default; inspect `skippedClaims` to audit carried evidence and prior decisions.
